name: O.R.C. Praying Mantis Nymph
description: The O.R.C. Praying Mantis Nymph is the militarized version of the mantis nymph in Grounded 2. It keeps its quick vertical strikes, but now chains them with much more intent to destroy the player's tempo.
behavior: It patrols vegetation, pumpkins, and O.R.C. zones with far more commitment than a normal nymph. It may move little before engaging, but once it does it barely gives up control of the duel.
interactionWithPlayer: It attacks on sight and especially punishes players with slow reactions or weak reads on slash order. Stand still too long and it links pounce into charged strike very easily.
interactionWithCreatures: It often enters as a light finisher inside O.R.C. groups, capitalizing on enemies that already have you pinned in place.
strategy: Fresh is still the best answer. Block the opening slash, wait for the end of the charged strike or pounce, and do not force frontal punishes when the vertical shockwave is likely.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary: Slash: 94. 3-Hit Combo Slash: 94. Charged Strike: 125. Pounce: 113. Vertical Shockwave: 106.

abilities.name: Slash
abilities.description: A quick slash used to open pressure and test your response.

abilities.name: 3-Hit Combo Slash
abilities.description: It chains several slashes in a row to punish anyone who answers too early.

abilities.name: Charged Strike
abilities.description: It delays briefly before driving in a deeper, stronger strike.

abilities.name: Pounce
abilities.description: It launches forward to land on the player and resume pressure immediately.

abilities.name: Vertical Shockwave
abilities.description: It strikes downward hard enough to create a vertical shock that complicates frontal punishes.
